title: 10 best herbal teas for indigestion
description: Cinchona officinalis teas helps with indigestion because of its unique properties. The main active compound, quinine, has anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects that aid in soothing digestive issues. The tea also contains other beneficial compounds like alkaloids and glycosides, which help to regulate digestive enzymes and reduce inflammation in the stomach and intestines. This results in improved digestion, reduced bloating, and a decrease in symptoms associated with indigestion,...
